title: Rem-pig pack
description: This resource pack replaces boring ordinary pig with unboring and unordinary Rem version
body:
This resource pack replaces boring ordinary pig with unboring and unordinary Rem version.

The sound has also been replaced, but be careful, some of it can cause brain damage (I've already suffered irreparable damage from the "kapuri" sound.)

Only temperate pig has been replaced so far, but others will be replaced soon.
US English and Russian languages supported
**Do not forget her**

[Download from PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/rem-pig-pack/)
